preReview.title: St. Louis City contra Houston Dynamo: Critchley orgulloso de la pasión de los anfitriones a pesar de la mala racha
preReview.description: St. Louis City espera recuperarse de una desalentadora derrota mientras recibe al Houston Dynamo el domingo.

preReview.title: St. Louis City v Houston Dynamo: Critchley proud of hosts’ passion despite poor form
preReview.description: St. Louis City are hoping to bounce back from a disheartening loss as they host the Houston Dynamo on Sunday.

preReview.title: St. Louis City contro Houston Dynamo: Critchley orgoglioso della passione degli ospiti nonostante la cattiva forma
preReview.description: St. Louis City spera di riprendersi da una sconfitta scoraggiante mentre ospita gli Houston Dynamo domenica.

preReview.title: St. Louis City x Houston Dynamo: Critchley orgulhoso da paixão dos anfitriões apesar da má forma
preReview.description: St. Louis City espera se recuperar de uma derrota desanimadora ao receber o Houston Dynamo no domingo.

preReview.title: St. Louis City contre Houston Dynamo : Critchley fier de la passion des hôtes malgré la mauvaise forme
preReview.description: St. Louis City espère rebondir après une défaite décourageante alors qu'ils accueillent le Houston Dynamo dimanche.

preReview.title: St. Louis City gegen Houston Dynamo: Critchley stolz auf die Leidenschaft der Gastgeber trotz schlechter Form
preReview.description: St. Louis City hofft, sich von einer enttäuschenden Niederlage zu erholen, wenn sie am Sonntag die Houston Dynamo empfangen.

preReview.title: سانت لويس سيتي ضد هيوستن دينامو: كريتشلي فخور بشغف الفريق المضيف رغم المستوى السيء
preReview.description: سانت لويس سيتي يأملون في التعافي من خسارة محبطة وهم يستضيفون هيوستن دينامو يوم الأحد.

preReview.title: St. Louis City x Houston Dynamo: Critchley orgulhoso da paixão dos anfitriões apesar da má fase
preReview.description: O St. Louis City espera se recuperar de uma derrota desanimadora ao receber o Houston Dynamo no domingo.

QAData.question: Who won between St. Louis City and Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 31 Aug 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Houston Dynamo FC won 3–2 over St. Louis City on Sun, 31 Aug 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
